nodes.name: Western long-tailed hornbill
nodes.summary: Western long-tailed hornbill（Western long-tailed hornbill，学名 Horizocerus albocristatus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联11个分布地点节点。

links.evidence: The western long-tailed hornbill has a large range in West Africa, occurring from southern Sierra Leone, east to Benin including Côte d'Ivoire, Ghana, Guinea, Liberia, and Togo
